name: Facelift Cloud
description:
If you want a comprehensive solution for managing social media activities, try Facelift Cloud. With a suite of tools for publishing, analytics, and community management, it’s ideal for medium to large businesses. Its extensive feature set and ability to streamline social media processes saves time and money, turning teams of all sizes into well-oiled machines.

Distinct Features:

  • Facelift Cloud offers custom pricing based on features and the scale of the business
  • Advanced analytics give you detailed insights into your performance
  • Make community management a breeze with smart engagement tools and a social inbox
  • Supported platforms include Facebook, Instagram, X (Twitter), LinkedIn, and YouTube.

Key Features:

✅ Multi-platform publishing

✅ Detailed analytics

✅ Community engagement
what_people_say:
What people say :

Ready to give your socials a facelift? Facelift Cloud just makes social media… easier. That’s why it’s a top pick for organizations seeking to enhance their social media strategy with efficiency and precision.

Here’s what users think:

“Facelift Cloud has streamlined our social media strategy, but it was a learning curve for sure. That being said, we love the analytics. We love the community engagement features. We love it. It works for us, end of story.”

“It’s great for managing large-scale social media operations, but I wish it had more integration with CRM systems. Like, c’mon, what company of our size isn’t using a CRM?”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Simplified user interface
  • 🚫 CRM integration
  • 🚫 Multi-brand support
